=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Lawrence Joel Veterans Memorial Coliseum
Winston-Salem, North Carolina
8 February 2002

I have no info about lineage and taper. The quality of this recording is incredible.

 

01 I Am The Man, Thomas (acoustic), 02 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic) (Bob on harp), 03 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Larry on cittern), 04 Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin and Bob on harp), 05 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum, 06 Just Like A Woman (Larry on pedal steel and Bob on harp), 07 Lonesome Day Blues, 08 High Water (For Charlie Patton) (Larry on banjo), 09 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic), 10 A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall (acoustic), 11 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp)


01 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), 02 Sugar Baby (Tony on standup bass), 03 Cold Irons Bound, 04 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35, (encore), 05 Love Sick, 06 Highway 61 Revisited, 07 If Dogs Run Free (acoustic) (Bob on harp), 08 Honest With Me, 09 Blowin' In The Wind 




Concert # 1389 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 6 of the 2002 US Winter Tour. 2002 concert # 6.

Concert # 6 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

 

1–4, 9–11, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.
2, 4, 6, 11, 18, 20 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
1, 4, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).
